_note: SAMPLE / DEMO DATA — illustrative metro examples for location-fit guidance. Verify VA facilities via the VA facility locator (va.gov/find-locations) and job markets independently. Not an endorsement of any location.

rules.highDisability: With a higher rating or ongoing care needs, prioritize living within ~30–45 minutes of a VA Medical Center and check specialty-care availability before you sign a lease.
rules.midDisability: Keep a VA clinic (CBOC) within easy reach and know where your nearest full VA Medical Center is.
rules.ruralNote: Rural living can absolutely work — pair a VA community clinic (CBOC) with VA telehealth, and confirm Community Care options for anything the clinic doesn't cover.
rules.generalNote: Balance four things: VA access, the job market for YOUR path, cost of living, and community — a veteran network nearby changes everything.

metros.name: San Antonio
metros.va: Major VA medical center + military medical hub

metros.name: Dallas–Fort Worth
metros.va: VA medical center + broad clinic network
metros.note: Massive job market across every track.

metros.name: Tampa
metros.note: Strong defense/vet employer base; no state income tax.

metros.name: Phoenix
metros.va: VA medical center + growing clinic network

metros.name: Colorado Springs
metros.va: VA clinics + military treatment facilities nearby
metros.note: Defense-heavy, outdoors lifestyle, big vet community.

metros.name: Nashville
metros.note: Healthcare capital; booming trades; no state income tax.

metros.name: Raleigh–Durham
metros.note: Education + tech corridor with veteran pipelines.

metros.name: Pittsburgh
metros.note: Affordable, strong VA presence, real trades economy.

metros.name: Sioux Falls
metros.note: Small-city pace WITH a VA medical center — rare combo.

metros.name: Boise
metros.note: Outdoors life plus a real VAMC.

metros.name: Rural + telehealth pattern
metros.va: CBOC clinic + VA telehealth + Community Care
metros.note: Country living works when you anchor to a CBOC and confirm Community Care coverage first.
